note: Not resolvable — structural boundaries of the system

principles.name: El mapa no puede verificarse completamente desde dentro
principles.description: Map cannot fully verify itself from inside — without a tool whose C exceeds the map in the domain being examined. Limit = not finding that tool, not absence of verification.

principles.name: Experiencia pre-conceptual inaccesible
principles.description: Pre-conceptual experience is inaccessible to conceptual tools without circularity

principles.name: Por que algo en vez de nada — abierto
principles.description: Why something rather than nothing — open
